task.title: Modernize {legacy_module} to current standards
task.description: Complete the following task: Modernize {legacy_module} to current standards. Follow best practices and ensure quality.
constraints: Do NOT change the database schema.
Do NOT touch .env or any credential files.
Do NOT modify anything under tests/.

steps.thought: Before making changes, I should ensure all tests pass.
steps.observation:
version: '3.8'

services:
  subscription:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgres://user:pass@db:5432/subscription-project
      - REDIS_URL=redis://cache:6379
    depends_on:
      - db
      - cache
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8080/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

  db:
    image: postgres:15
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: subscription-project
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pass
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  cache:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"

volumes:
  postgres_data:
